# WOWOHCOOL -- Shenzhen Charger Factory Since 2013
> Professional OEM/ODM manufacturer of wireless chargers, power banks, GaN chargers, and car chargers. ISO 9001 certified factory in Shenzhen, China. Serving 200+ global brands including Jacob Jensen and Bosch.

## Core Pages
- Home: https://www.wowohcool.com/
- About Us: https://www.wowohcool.com/about.html
- OEM/ODM Services: https://www.wowohcool.com/service.html
- Contact Us: https://www.wowohcool.com/contact.html
- All Products: https://www.wowohcool.com/products/
- Blog: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog.html

## Products
- Power Banks (semi-solid-state, PD 3.1 up to 140W): https://www.wowohcool.com/products/power-bank.html
- GaN Chargers (GaN V, PD 3.1 up to 240W): https://www.wowohcool.com/products/gan-charger.html
- Wireless Chargers (Qi2, MagSafe, 15W MPP): https://www.wowohcool.com/products/wireless-charger.html
- Car Chargers (PD 3.1, GaN, 140W, E-Mark): https://www.wowohcool.com/products/car-charger.html

## Key Facts
- Founded: 2013
- Location: Shenzhen, China (5,000 sqm facility)
- Certifications: CE, FCC, RoHS, Qi/Qi2, UN38.3, PSE, ISO 9001
- MOQ: 500 units per SKU (OEM), 1000 units (ODM)
- Monthly production capacity: 1,000,000+ units
- R&D team: 50+ senior engineers
- Key clients: Jacob Jensen, Bosch, 200+ global brands
- Total units shipped: 10M+

## FAQ
- **What is your MOQ?** 500-1000 units for standard OEM branding; 2000 units for deep ODM customization.
- **What certifications do your products carry?** CE, FCC, RoHS, Qi/Qi2, UN38.3 (power banks), PSE. We assist with UL, KC and other market-specific certifications.
- **What is your lead time?** 25-30 days for OEM orders after sample approval; 45-60 days for ODM projects with new tooling.
- **Do you offer samples?** Yes, standard samples ship within 3-7 days.
- **What payment terms?** T/T (30% deposit, 70% before shipment). FOB, EXW, DDP shipping options available.
- **What is your warranty?** 12-24 months depending on product category. Defective units replaced or credited.

## Client Testimonials
- **Jacob Jensen** (Denmark): "WOWOHCOOL solved our complex ODM challenge — integrating infrared and touch dual-sensing into a compact wireless car mount where other suppliers failed. 6,000 units delivered with zero defects."
- **Bosch** (Germany): "Delivered 10,000 units of 65W GaN car chargers on an emergency fast-track timeline, meeting our pre-sale campaign deadline with 5-day sample turnaround."
- **European Retail Chain**: "Delivered OEM wireless chargers with Grade A Li-polymer cells featuring 500+ cycle life and on-time shipment."
- **US Tech Brand**: "Flexible MOQ and customization support helped us launch a magnetic wireless power bank line."

- How to Choose a Reliable China Charger Supplier: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/choose-reliable-china-charger-supplier.html — Factory verification, OEM/ODM negotiation, and sourcing best practices.

- OEM vs ODM Guide: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/oem-vs-odm-guide.html — Detailed comparison of OEM and ODM manufacturing for charging products.
- How to Choose a Factory in China: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/how-to-choose-factory.html — Step-by-step guide for evaluating electronics factories.
- Factory Verification Checklist 2026: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/factory-verification-checklist.html — Expert checklist for auditing charger & power bank production lines.
- Qi2 vs MagSafe Guide: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/qi2-vs-magsafe-guide.html — Technical differences, charging speeds, and licensing costs.
- GaN Charger Guide 2026: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/gan-chargers-guide.html — GaN vs silicon technology comparison for OEM/ODM brands.
- QC & Quality Control Guide: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/quality-control-guide.html — Factory QC processes for charging accessories manufacturing.
- Power Bank Specs Guide: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/power-bank-specs-guide.html — Semi-solid-state batteries, PD 3.1, and capacity selection.
- Qi Certification Guide: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/qi-certification-guide.html — WPC Qi/Qi2 certification process for wireless charger manufacturers.
- USB-C PD Fast Charging Guide: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/usb-c-pd-fast-charging-guide.html — USB-C Power Delivery standards explained for OEM sourcing.
- Import Costs from China Guide: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/import-costs-guide.html — Tariffs, shipping, and total landed cost calculation.
- Shipping from China Guide: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/shipping-from-china-guide.html — Freight options, customs clearance, and delivery timelines.
- Wireless Charging How It Works: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/wireless-charging-works.html — Electromagnetic induction and Qi technology explained.
- Hotel Charging Solutions: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/hotel-charging-solutions.html — Wholesale charging stations for hospitality industry.
- Certifications US EU Guide: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/certifications-us-eu-guide.html — Required certifications for selling chargers in US and EU markets.
- Car Charger Guide: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/car-charger-guide.html — High-power PD 3.1 and GaN car adapter buying guide.
- Charger Safety Standards: https://www.wowohcool.com/blog/charger-safety-standards.html — Global safety regulations for phone and laptop chargers.
